about.title: About Melli Exchange
about.desc: A Coquitlam-based currency exchange and gold dealer serving the Greater Vancouver community.
about.who_p1: Melli Exchange offers competitive walk-in rates for major world currencies and trusted, transparent pricing for gold. We focus on personal service — every customer is greeted by a real person who knows the market and is ready to answer questions.
about.who_p2: Our location in Coquitlam serves the Tri-Cities area, with easy access for Burnaby, Port Moody, and Greater Vancouver clients. Stop by during business hours — no appointment necessary.
about.what_1: Foreign currency exchange (USD, EUR, GBP, AED, IRR, and more)

contact.title: Contact us
contact.desc: Stop by the shop, give us a call, or send an email. We're happy to help.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about our services. Can't find your answer? Call us or stop by.
faq.q1: Do I need an appointment to exchange currency or buy gold?
faq.a1: No appointment needed. Simply walk in during business hours and our team will assist you right away. Most transactions take under 5 minutes.
faq.a2: We exchange all major world currencies including USD, EUR, GBP, AED, IRR, CAD, and many more. Contact us if you need a specific currency and we'll do our best to accommodate you.
faq.q3: How are your exchange rates set?
faq.a3: Our rates are updated daily based on current market conditions. The rate displayed is the rate you receive — no hidden fees or surprises at the counter.
faq.q4: What gold karats do you buy and sell?
faq.a4: We deal in 18K, 21K, 22K, and 24K gold. Whether you are purchasing jewelry or investment gold, or selling gold you already own, we offer fair and transparent pricing.
faq.q5: Do you buy gold jewelry or only sell it?
faq.a5: We both buy and sell gold jewelry and bullion. Bring your gold pieces in and our team will assess them and offer a competitive price based on the current market rate.
faq.q6: Is there a minimum or maximum amount for currency exchange?
faq.a6: There is no minimum for most transactions. For large exchanges, please contact us in advance so we can ensure we have the required currency available.
faq.a7: Yes. Melli Exchange is fully registered with FINTRAC (Financial Transactions and Reports Analysis Centre of Canada) and complies with all Canadian anti-money-laundering regulations.
faq.q8: Do I need to bring ID?
faq.a8: For transactions above the regulatory threshold, a valid government-issued photo ID is required by Canadian law. We recommend bringing ID for any significant exchange.
faq.q9: Where are you located and what are your hours?
faq.a9: We are located in Coquitlam, BC. Our hours are Monday to Saturday 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM and Sunday 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM.

news.title: News & Market Analysis
news.desc: Currency and gold market news from VBCE, FXStreet, Kitco, and the Melli Exchange team.
news.intro: Stay up to date with live currency exchange rates, gold price movements, and financial market analysis relevant to Canadian dollar holders. We track USD/CAD, EUR/CAD, GBP/CAD, AED/CAD, and gold (18K–24K) daily.
news.empty: News temporarily unavailable. Please check back soon.

footer.desc: Trusted currency exchange and gold dealer serving Coquitlam and the Greater Vancouver area.
